summary: Iteration 112 - Security Build 2 Testing Complete. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Tests verified all 6 security bug fixes.

minor.issue: Helpful vote endpoint doesn't verify review exists before creating vote record (creates orphaned data for non-existent reviews)

critical_code_review_comments: BUG-N1 FIXED: Tenant isolation (_authed_user + require_workspace_access) added to routes_orchestration.py, routes_finetune.py, routes_benchmarks.py, routes_code_repo.py

BUG-N1 FIXED: Entity-scoped access checks (require_deployment_access, require_directive_access, require_channel_access) added to routes_deployments.py, routes_directive_engine.py, routes_enhancements.py
BUG-N2 FIXED: safe_regex used in 16+ route files for ReDoS protection
BUG-N3 FIXED: _get_api_key in routes_media.py is now async and uses key_resolver
BUG-N5 FIXED: Review flag threshold requires 3 unique flags via flag_count field + review_flags collection
BUG-N6 FIXED: Helpful vote dedup via review_helpful_votes collection - returns 400 on duplicate
BUG-N7 FIXED: Orchestration queries filter by workspace_id to prevent cross-workspace data access
seed_data_creation: Session tokens created via mongosh for authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 Build 2 security fixes verified. Key tests: 1) Fake workspace returns 403 for orchestrations/finetune/benchmarks/code-repo routes, 2) Valid workspace returns 200, 3) ReDoS patterns complete in <1s, 4) Helpful vote dedup returns 400 on duplicate, 5) Fake orchestration ID returns 404 (workspace_id filter working). The routes_reviews.py helpful endpoint doesn't verify review existence before creating vote record - minor data integrity issue but dedup works correctly.

verified_security_fixes.BUG_N5_flag_threshold: Review flag structure verified with flag_count field
verified_security_fixes.BUG_N6_helpful_dedup: Second helpful vote returns 400 'Already marked as helpful'
